summary: The diff implements all four requirements substantially. REQ-1 (landing page, island list, detail views with attractions/beaches/tips, navigation), REQ-2 (backend Motoko actor with structured island data, getAllIslands and getIslandByName queries), REQ-3 (tropical color palette, serif headings, card layout), and REQ-4 (hero image on landing page, island images on cards, assets from /assets/generated) are all present. All acceptance criteria appear to be met based on the evidence in the diff.
